prompt: Photorealistic portrait of a 20-year-old woman with platinum blonde hair in a long braid over one shoulder. Light-skinned, sculpted oval face with high cheekbones, piercing blue-green almond eyes, full mauve-pink lips, soft captivating gaze directly at camera. She wears a cropped hot pink hoodie and high-waisted light blue distressed denim shorts. Leaning back against a dark window frame, one arm raised high on the frame, the other hand delicately holding a single red rose near her face. Small stud earrings. Dark indoor night scene, faint city lights bokeh outside. Direct on-camera flash lighting, hard contrast, shadows cast behind her, vibrant colors. Three-quarter shot from slightly low angle, sharp focus on face and rose. 4:5 aspect ratio. Raw DSLR flash photography, visible film grain. Cool girl, romantic, playful mood.
